title: Chandan Fort
tagline: Chandan Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Chandan Fort is located in Satara District.
overview.description: Chandan Fort is located in Satara District. This fort is situated on a hilly spur from the main ridge of Sahyadri. This fort is frequently visited by trekkers and pilgrims. The villages at the base are rich in sugarcane and other cultivation.

topPlaces.name: Vandan Fort
topPlaces.description: Vandan Fort (Marathi: वंदन किल्ला) is located in Satara District. This fort is situated on a hilly spur from the main ridge of Sahyadri.

topPlaces.name: Banawadi
topPlaces.description: Banawadi is a census village of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is situated near to the Satara Phaltan state highway, about 21 km north of Satara, about 108 km from Pune and 220 km from Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Wagholi, Satara
topPlaces.description: Wagholi is a village in Koregaon taluka of Satara district of Maharashtra, India. It plays an important role in the economic, social, cultural, and educational lives of people in Koregaon, and Satara Districts.

topPlaces.name: Dare (Satara)
topPlaces.description: Dare is a village in the Jawali taluka of Satara district in Maharashtra, India.

items.note: Vandan Fort (Marathi: वंदन किल्ला) is located in Satara District. This fort is situated on a hilly spur from the main ridge of Sahyadri.

Banawadi is a census village of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is situated near to the Satara Phaltan state highway, about 21 km north of Satara, about 108 km from Pune and 220 km from Mumbai.

Wagholi is a village in Koregaon taluka of Satara district of Maharashtra, India. It plays an important role in the economic, social, cultural, and educational lives of people in Koregaon, and Satara Districts.
Dare is a village in the Jawali taluka of Satara district in Maharashtra, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandan Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandan Fort is Apr – Jun, Sep – Oct. Summers are 10–22°C and winters are -6–10°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandan Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (78 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandan Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandan Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandan Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Chandan Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chandan Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vandan Fort, Banawadi, Wagholi, Satara, Dare (Satara).
